subject: You Have Won!
body: PLEASE DO NOT RESPOND TO THIS EMAIL Records show that you entered to win the state's powerball jackpot on 11/15/2022. You are receiving this email because you have been listed as one of the winners. To claim your prize please visit the site below and fill out all information needed to collect. You must process all information within a weeks time or you may lose out on your winnings. Congratulations! Collect your earnings! please click here Your prompt response regarding this matter is appreciated. Sincerely, Powerball.

subject: URGENT: Fraudulent Activity Detected!
body: Chase Bank Alert URGENT: Your Account is at Risk Dear customer, Your Chase bank account appears to have suspicious activities. To protect your data, we need you to urgently click the link below to verify your information. Please log in by clicking here. If you don't act promptly, your account may be suspended. As a token of our appreciation for your patience and understanding, we are offering you a $100 credit towards your next month bill. Thank you for being a valued Chase Bank customer Best, Chase Support support@chasesecuredprotection.net www.chasecreditcard.com/reactivate
